# Staves
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Staves&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom staves and old staves that have been edited from how they appear on the predicting RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Staves
!Damage 
!Range
!RoF
!Shots
!Stats
!Pierce
!Armor Pierce
!Obstacle Pierce
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Artifact/Primal Effect
|-
|Staff of the vital unity
|65-110
|8.91
|
|2
|
|
|
|
|5%
|T13
|
|-
|Staff of the Fundamental Core
|75-115
|8.91
|
|2
|
|
|
|
|6%
|T14
|
|-
|Starlight Crook
|80-125
|8.91
|
|2
|
|
|
|
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Sweet Sugar Rush Staff
|90-138
|6
|125%
|
|
|
|
|
|2%
|Unique
|
|-
|Head of the Firebreather
|40-70
|9
|120%
|4
|
|
|yes
|
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Staff of Nature
|65-140
|9
|120%
|2
|
|
|
|
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Powerful Twig
|90-270
|9
|50%
|3
|
|
|
|
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Hela's Power
|100-360
|7
|45%
|5
|<nowiki>+80mp</nowiki>
+12wis
|yes
|yes
|yes
|7%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Gravedigger's Shovel
|100-110
|7
|75%
|5
|<nowiki>-5def</nowiki>
+4spd
|
|
|yes
|6%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Staff of Unholy Sacrifice
|150-190
|8.05
|75%
|4
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Last Hope
|-
|Anatis Staff
|80-100
|7.5
|25%
|
|
|
|
|
|2%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|}
